evidence: "Errol Morris does it again as this documentary is really something to see."
"This show is awesome. Not for everyone but I found it very entertaining and it has some awesome actors."
"Curtis Hanson is able to weaver a complex issue into a compelling drama."
"While this could have been a little shorter it was a solid movie."
"The pace of the dialogue is breakneck and is really impressive."
"This was very cool. Compelling, interesting and with enough story lines to fill a Toyota Tundra."
"Great cast and great job consolidating the story for the big screen."
"Happy to report Ridley did a fine job."
"While I am big fan of Pearlman I just can't give this show a vote of confidence."
"This series was amazing. A great look at three of this countries most influential people."
"It's all about the characters and this one looks like it has some potential."
"This should be required viewing in every high school history class."
"I felt a little cheated on it too."

summary: The user enjoys complex narratives and high-quality productions, particularly in documentaries and dramas. They appreciate fast pacing and strong character development, indicating a preference for engaging and emotionally resonant content.
